questions.scenario: A VM-hosted worker fails overnight, but logs only exist in a local file that rotated away. What was missing?

options.text: A plan to ship and retain VM and application logs where operators can read them.

questions.explanation: VM runtime responsibility includes log collection and retention.

questions.scenario: A team chooses Compute Engine for host control. Which duty does that usually keep with the team?
questions.explanation: VMs keep more server operations, including patch planning, with the team.

questions.scenario: Which items are part of honest VM operation?

options.text: Assuming manual SSH changes are permanent design.

questions.explanation: Compute Engine is explicit server control, which means explicit server operations.
